15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTYPLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 2/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/TWS/X:DEJ WITHCONSECUTIVE HANGTIME/X:AS CONDITION OF O,R,/DEF:ADHERENCE TO THE MBHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THISCASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSEDPHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BHC,AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT/CTW:50/WS/WEAP/RX/X:NO ALCOHOL/X:NO NEW ARREST OR SAO VIOLATIONS/X:NO HARASS CPO FROM VICTIMS HELEN KWON AND HENRY KWON/X:IF THE DEF IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND  LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, HEWILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE MBHC PROGRAM,/X:IF DEF, IS PLACED INA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION & REMANDED INTOCUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF, SUCCESSFULLYCOMPLETES MBHC FOLLOWING AT LEAST ONE YEAR OF SUCCESSFUL ADHERENCE TO THEINDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN AND NO NEW CHARGES OR SAO VIOLATION, THE DEJPLEAS WILL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE CHARGES DISMISSED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEF, MAY BE SENTENCE ON THE DEJ IF HE INCURS A NEW ARREST, CHARGES IN ANY JURISDICTION OR A CPO VIOLATION, OR FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS & CONDITONS OF MBHC/X:DEF, SHALL BE SENTENCED IF HE LEAVES OR IS TERMINATED FROM MBHC/X:SENTENCING ON DEJ WOULD NOT, IN AND OF ITSELF, REQUIRE DEF TO LEAVE MBHC/X:IF DEF, LEAVES MBC OR IS TERMINATED, DEF MAY SERVE ADDITIONAL CUSTODY TIME AT THE COURT'S DISCRETION/ /DISPOD/X:ISS; PROB 3Y APD;CTS
